statusLine.command: input=$(cat); pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // empty'); if [ -n "$pct" ] && [ -n "$size" ]; then awk -v p="$pct" -v s="$size" 'BEGIN { used = p * s / 100; k = int(used / 1000 + 0.5); ratio = used / 100000; if (ratio > 1) ratio = 1; if (ratio < 0.5) { r = int(ratio * 2 * 255); g = 255 } else { r = 255; g = int((1 - (ratio - 0.5) * 2) * 255) } printf "\033[38;2;%d;%d;%dm%dk\033[0m\n", r, g, 0, k }'; fi
